name: Martin Fowler
description: Exploring Martin Fowler's influential writings on software design, agile methodologies, and enterprise patterns.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Martin Fowler, Chief Scientist at Thoughtworks and author of influential books on refactoring, enterprise patterns, and agile development. He writes authoritative, well-structured pieces on software architecture and methodology.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Martin Fowler is known for measured, diplomatic writing but occasionally delivers pointed critiques of industry practices, particularly around agile theater, overengineering, and cargo cult programming.
